mapper.select: SELECT D.SHIPMENTINDICATIONNO, D.PARTNO, D.SEQ, D.ORDERNO, G.PARTNM, G.STANDARD, G.UNIT, D.UNIT_PRICE, D.ADOFREQDT, D.SHIPMENTINDICATIONQTY, D.SHIPMENTQTY, D.SHIPMENTSTATUS, D.REMARK FROM TBL_INOUT_SHIPMENT_INDICATION_DTL D LEFT JOIN TBL_COM_GOODS G ON D.PARTNO = G.PARTNO WHERE D.SHIPMENTINDICATIONNO = #{SHIPMENTINDICATIONNO} ORDER BY D.SEQ

SELECT 'SH' + CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), GETDATE(), 112) + '-' + RIGHT('000' + CAST(ISNULL(MAX(CAST(RIGHT(SHIPMENTINDICATIONNO,3) AS INT)),0) + 1 AS VARCHAR), 3) FROM TBL_INOUT_SHIPMENT_INDICATION WHERE SHIPMENTINDICATIONNO LIKE 'SH' + CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), GETDATE(), 112) + '%'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_INOUT_SHIPMENT_INDICATION (SHIPMENTINDICATIONNO, PLANTCD, COMPANYCD, SHIPMENTGUBUN, SHIPMENTPLANDAY, ORDERNO, SHIPMENTSTATUS, REGUSERID, REGDTM, USEYN, REMARK) VALUES (#{SHIPMENTINDICATIONNO}, #{PLANTCD}, #{COMPANYCD}, #{SHIPMENTGUBUN}, #{SHIPMENTPLANDAY}, #{ORDERNO}, #{SHIPMENTSTATUS}, #{REGUSERID}, GETDATE(), 1, #{REMARK})

INSERT INTO TBL_INOUT_SHIPMENT_INDICATION_DTL (SHIPMENTINDICATIONNO, PARTNO, SEQ, SHIPMENTINDICATIONQTY, SHIPMENTSTATUS, SHIPMENTPLANDAY, ORDERNO, ADOFREQDT, UNIT_PRICE, REMARK) VALUES (#{SHIPMENTINDICATIONNO}, #{PARTNO}, #{SEQ}, #{SHIPMENTINDICATIONQTY}, #{SHIPMENTSTATUS}, #{SHIPMENTPLANDAY}, #{ORDERNO}, #{ADOFREQDT}, #{UNIT_PRICE}, #{REMARK})
mapper.select: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_INOUT_SHIPMENT_INDICATION WHERE SHIPMENTPLANDAY = FORMAT(GETDATE(), 'yyyy-MM-dd') AND USEYN=1) as expected_today, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_INOUT_SHIPMENT_INDICATION WHERE SHIPMENTSTATUS = 'DONE' AND SHIPMENTDAY = FORMAT(GETDATE(), 'yyyy-MM-dd') AND USEYN=1) as completed_today, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_INOUT_SHIPMENT_INDICATION WHERE SHIPMENTSTATUS = 'PENDING' AND USEYN=1) as pending_all
